Compliance.description: Part of Avis Budget Group; licensed SA operation; CPA compliant; no major violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.3/5; mixed Google reviews; complaints on service/billing but some positive experiences.

Product Value.description: Budget-positioned pricing; good value for basic needs; less fleet variety than premium brands.

Innovation.description: Online booking; app available; standard fleet tech; loyalty via Avis group.

Customer Support.description: Phone/online; reviews indicate slow resolution for disputes.

Accessibility & Security.description: Standard practices; app available; national coverage.

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed-negative; value praised but service concerns on HelloPeter.
